prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
Here's an opening paragraph:

In the deepest, bluest part of Coral Reef Valley, there lived an octopus named Oliver who was so shy that he could change colors faster than most creatures could blink. When other sea creatures swam by, Oliver would quickly turn the exact shade of the nearby rocks or seaweed, hoping no one would notice him. His eight long arms would curl up tight, and he would peek out with one big, worried eye, wondering what it might be like to have a friend who didn't mind that he was a little different.
